shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '340,430p' src/useFieldArray.ts && sed -n '1010,1095p' src/__tests__/useForm/trigger.test.tsx && rg -n \"updateFieldArrayRootError|root.*field.array|field-array root|nested.*error\" src/__tests__"
/bin/bash -lc 'cat src/utils/convertToArrayPayload.ts && cat src/constants.ts | rg -n -C 2 ROOT_ERROR && rg -n "function isObject|const isObject|export.*isObject" src/utils src | head -30'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/isObject.ts && sed -n '930,1040p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '300,410p' src/useFieldArray.ts && sed -n '1200,1265p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"_setFieldArray\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts | head -10 && sed -n '1450,1555p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/remove.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1180,1260p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '1090,1150p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && rg -n \"function unsetEmptyArray|unsetEmptyArray\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/utils"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts'
